ciphers.text: playing V → IV → III in order at any tempo triggers Aria's handshake
ciphers.encoding_hint: V (Hierophant) → IV (Emperor) → III (Empress). The 'inheritance' sequence — institution → patriarch → mother. Matches Aria's data-overlay sigils on Empress card.

ciphers.text: playing 0 → XXI (Fool then World) closes the journey loop
ciphers.encoding_hint: first → last. Completes the major arcana arc; unlocks the COMPASS's center node animation.

ciphers.text: any 3 cards from row 1 (LOVERS/CHARIOT/STRENGTH/HERMIT/WHEEL/JUSTICE/HANGED/DEATH) played simultaneously
ciphers.encoding_hint: burgundy row chord — Nicola's spectrum. Unlocks Empress's split-toggle independently of the badge click.
